summary: Frontend testing completed for all pillar pages and sub-pages. All 15 main pillar pages load correctly without error. All 6 tested sub-pages load with category-specific hero content. Voice search button and Products/Services toggle verified on applicable pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pillar pages and sub-pages tested and verified working. Voice search button and Products/Services toggle present on main pillar pages.
